title: callitriche autumnalis f. microphylla-pedicellata
intro: Callitriche autumnalis f. microphylla-pedicellata, also known as autumn-stemmed water starwort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Callitriche autumnalis f. microphylla-pedicellata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used in cooking and as a garnish in salads.
